description: List (and optionally download) Google Drive files via a service account. Returns a pandas DataFrame, one row per matching file. For Google Sheets, prefer google_sheets_ingestion. For Google Docs text, prefer google_docs_extractor. This component handles everything else: PDFs, CSVs, images, arbitrary uploads.

outputs.description: One row per matching Drive file with id, name, mimeType, size, modifiedTime, webViewLink, owner_email. Optional `path` and `content` columns when download=true.

credentials.label: Credentials (dict)
credentials.description: Service account credentials as a dict. Set this OR credentials_path OR rely on GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS.

credentials_path.label: Credentials Path
credentials_path.description: Path to the service-account JSON file. Falls back to GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS env var.

folder_id.label: Folder ID
folder_id.description: Drive folder ID to list. Mutually exclusive with `query`.

query.label: Query
query.description: Drive search query (Drive's `q` syntax). Mutually exclusive with `folder_id`.

mime_type_filter.label: MIME Type Filter
mime_type_filter.description: Optional list of MIME types to keep.

max_files.label: Max Files
max_files.description: Stop after this many files (avoids accidental full-Drive scans).

download.label: Download
download.description: If true, also download file contents.

download_max_bytes.label: Download Max Bytes
download_max_bytes.description: Skip files larger than this. Default 10 MB.

inline_text_content.label: Inline Text Content
inline_text_content.description: When download=true and the file is text-ish, also write decoded content into a `content` column.

name: Google Drive Ingestion
